# Compression Ai MCP

> MEOK AI Labs MCP Server

`compression-ai-mcp` is a Model Context Protocol (MCP) server by MEOK AI Labs.

## Install

```bash
pip install compression-ai-mcp
```

Or run without installing:

```bash
uvx compression-ai-mcp
```

## Tools

- `estimate_ratio` — Estimate compression ratios for data using multiple algorithms.
- `suggest_algorithm` — Suggest the best compression algorithm for a given use case.
- `calculate_savings` — Calculate storage and bandwidth savings from compression.
- `benchmark_data` — Benchmark compression of data across all available algorithms.

## Links

- Source: https://github.com/CSOAI-ORG/compression-ai-mcp
- PyPI: https://pypi.org/project/compression-ai-mcp/
- MEOK AI Labs: https://meok.ai
- Council of AI: https://councilof.ai
